results.justification: EXACT TWIN — LlamaRL distributed async RL framework with cadence + lower step time IS the BAYANIHAN distributed-worker cadence-token coordination.
EXACT TWIN — MESI multi-agent LLM token synchronization + lazy invalidation IS the cadence-token broadcast for phase-coherence.
AsyncFlow async streaming with fine-grained scheduling IS the periodic cadence + distributed worker coordination.
EXACT TWIN — Subspace-optimization adaptive consensus gradient with linear weighting IS the asymmetric worker-weighted gradient aggregation.
GAC gradient alignment control IS the anti-twist structural-integrity gradient combination mechanism.
Distributed LLMs survey covers cadence + weighted + structural-constraint patterns.
EXACT TWIN — GaLore 2 low-rank gradient projection with eigenvalue subspace constraint IS the anti-twist λ-bound structural-integrity constraint.
Distributed LLM training survey covers cadence + weighted + structural patterns — functional saturation.
